layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all functional sections, optical alignment for buttons with icons.

surface_styles.input_field: bg-black border border-[#1F1F1F] focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white rounded-none text-white
surface_styles.button_primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none
surface_styles.button_secondary: bg-[#111111] text-white border border-[#1F1F1F] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-none
surface_styles.key_output_box: bg-black border border-[#1F1F1F] p-4 font-mono text-zinc-300 break-all rounded-none selection:bg-white selection:text-black
surface_styles.badge: bg-[#FACC15] text-[#422006] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-2 py-1 flex items-center gap-2

tabs.strategy: Cardless, technical look. Active tab has border-b-2 border-white text-white. Inactive tabs are text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300.
tabs.shadcn_override: Strip background and rounded corners from TabsList. Make it a simple bottom-bordered row.

header.strategy: Solid black background, border-b border-[#1F1F1F], z-50 sticky top-0 py-4 px-8 flex justify-between items-center

zero_knowledge_badge.strategy: High contrast Warning Yellow badge in the header. Use lucide-react 'ShieldCheck' or 'Lock' icon.

inputs.strategy: Use Shadcn Input but override with rounded-none, bg-black, strict border. Label is uppercase.

toast.strategy: Use Sonner for copy confirmation. High contrast: black bg, white border, white text.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard background color changes, no soft fades. Buttons translate-y-0.5 on active.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast white ring on focus for accessibility.

media_and_icons.icon_rules: Use stroke-width 2. Keep icons simple and functional (Copy, Check, Shield, Key).

background_texture.description: Dark abstract textured metallic surface with geometric pattern for modern design.
background_texture.usage: Use as a very low opacity (e.g., 3-5%) fixed background image to add texture to the stark black theme, breaking the digital flatness.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Key outputs must be highly legible.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all inputs, copy buttons, generate buttons, and tab triggers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page app using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.
Implement the UI with a strict 'Swiss & High-Contrast' Dark theme. Use exact hex codes provided.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for UI and 'JetBrains Mono' for all keys/hashes.
Structure the layout using the 'Control Room' Grid: dense, border-collapse styles, flat surfaces with 1px borders.
All crypto processing MUST be client-side. The server is never involved. Emphasize this with the Zero Knowledge badge.
For the Tabs component, customize shadcn heavily: remove the default grey background and pill shapes. Make it a flat, border-bottom layout.
Ensure all buttons and inputs are completely square (rounded-none) to fit the Brutalist Technical aesthetic.
Include lucide-react icons for visual anchors, especially for the copy actions.
Apply the background texture image with extreme subtlety (opacity-5 or mix-blend-overlay) over the black background.
Use standard Web Crypto API and appropriate WASM libraries for client-side Ed25519, Argon2id, and Nostr/JWT.
